query: The procurement planning documents were not published to the public.
A single bidder submitted a proposal for this contract.
The tender was advertised only 2 days before the submission deadline.
Several bidders submitted identical bid prices in the tender.
The winning bid was disqualified after being the lowest price.
The buyer used a non-competitive procedure without justification.
The contract delivery is delayed by 12 months and no penalty was applied.
Bidders used the same physical address and shared contact information.
The contract price increased by 40 percent after award through amendments.
Multiple direct awards were made just below the competitive threshold value.
The winning bidder is on a sanctions list and was debarred in another country.
Technical specifications in the tender were tailored to a specific supplier brand.
